name: hermes-attestation-guardian
description: Hermes-only runtime security attestation and drift detection skill. Generates deterministic posture artifacts, verifies integrity fail-closed, and classifies baseline drift severity.
author: prompt-security

files.description: Attestation schema, canonicalization, digest and validation helpers
Hermes-native advisory feed verification and state helpers
Advisory version-range parsing and matching helpers
Shared managed cron block and cadence helpers
Generate deterministic Hermes posture attestation artifact
Verify attestation schema, digest and optional detached signature
Fetch, verify, and persist Hermes advisory feed verification state
Advisory-aware guarded skill verification gate with explicit confirmation override
Optional recurring schedule setup for Hermes attestation runs
Optional recurring schedule setup for Hermes guarded advisory checks

execution.persistence: Runs on demand by default. Optional scheduler helper can install a managed schedule block when run with --apply.
execution.network_egress: Optional HTTPS advisory feed fetch via refresh_advisory_feed.mjs; no network required for local-mode verification

operator_review: Hermes-only skill: unsupported for OpenClaw runtime hooks.
Verify watch/trust-anchor policy paths before scheduling recurring runs.
Verification fails closed for schema/digest/signature errors and unauthenticated baseline inputs; diff threshold defaults to critical.
Advisory feed verification is fail-closed by default; unsigned bypass must remain temporary and operator-audited.
